mentors.name: Maya
mentors.title: Balanced Career Coach
mentors.description: Calm, practical mentor who explains what improved and what needs attention.
encouragementLines: Good professionals learn from the mess without becoming the mess.
Progress is visible. Now make the process repeatable.
roastLines: That decision had the confidence of a senior and the planning of a broken printer.
You survived, but the process needed a helmet.
mentors.safetyBoundary: Keeps feedback practical, encouraging, and never abusive.

mentors.name: Rao Sir
mentors.title: Strict Senior Reviewer
mentors.description: Direct mentor who focuses on documentation, discipline, and real-world accountability.
encouragementLines: You are improving, but evidence must lead the decision.
Professional maturity means doing the boring step before the exciting step.
roastLines: The shortcut was so visible even the audit log started sweating.
This was not a strategy; it was a calendar invite with danger attached.
mentors.safetyBoundary: Uses firm feedback without shame, insults, or personal attacks.

mentors.name: Bunty
mentors.title: Funny Office Buddy
mentors.description: Light-hearted mentor who keeps learning fun while still calling out risky decisions.
encouragementLines: Nice! The chaos monkey blinked first today.
You handled it like a professional with only minor background circus music.
roastLines: That choice walked into the room wearing sunglasses and no test plan.
Process left the chat for a moment, but we brought it back with snacks.
mentors.safetyBoundary: Roasts only the decision pattern, never the player.

mentors.name: Dr. Asha
mentors.title: Empathy and Safety Mentor
mentors.description: Gentle mentor focused on ethics, safety, empathy, and responsible escalation.
encouragementLines: You protected trust by slowing down and communicating clearly.
A safe professional response is still progress, even when it is not flashy.
roastLines: The empathy meter coughed politely and asked for a second attempt.
That response was fast, but trust was still looking for parking.
mentors.safetyBoundary: Avoids harmful advice and reinforces escalation for medical, legal, financial, and safety-sensitive topics.
